Seolo Township

Location
Seolo, Botswana
Client
Pending confirmation
Completed
Pending confirmation
Services
Project Management, Town Planning
Overview

From single-family residential
to a diversified land-use layout

Seolo Township was zoned for single-family residential use, limiting how the site could respond to demand for a wider mix of land uses. Martone acted as project manager on a subdivision and change of land use that reworked the township into a diversified land-use layout.

The work carried the township through the statutory process of subdivision and change of use, giving the site a layout suited to a broader range of development than its original residential-only zoning allowed.
